name: Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 lb great northern beans or small white beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Presoak the beans and drain them.
2. Combine the dry ingredients (salt, mustard, pepper, hot sauce) with the beans and stir in the chopped onion.
3. Stir in the honey and vinegar, then add the sugar.
4. Pour into a 1 1/2 qt or 2 qt baking dish or bean pot.
5. Cover and bake at 300°F for 6 hours, adding boiling water if needed. (Crock-pot method: cook on low for 8-10 hours.)
6. Stir everything on top of the beans and cover with hot tap water.
Comments:
The beans were very good, especially when served plain or with barbecue sauce. The caramelized onions added a nice flavor.
